title: Section 8 Company Registration India | Virtual Auditor

bodyText:
Looking for expert section 8 company registration india? Virtual Auditor provides practitioner-grade company law services in India, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) | Associate Company Secretary (ACS). We combine deep regulatory expertise with hands-on execution to deliver results within your timeline.

What is Section 8 Company Registration India | Virtual Auditor?

HEADING2: What We Deliver
Completed MCA filing with official acknowledgment and Certificate (where applicable). Drafted constitutional documents, resolutions, and compliance certificates. Post-registration compliance checklist with due dates for the first year. Digital copies of all filed forms and supporting documents. Ongoing compliance calendar and advisory support.
HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor
Virtual Auditor handles company law matters from incorporation through ongoing compliance, restructuring, and closure. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS) combines chartered accountancy with company secretarial expertise — ensuring both financial and corporate law compliance are handled under one roof. Physical offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai for in-person consultations and local ROC coordination.
With physical offices in Chennai (Spencer Plaza), Bangalore (MG Road), and Mumbai (Goregaon West), we offer both in-person and remote engagement models.
Company law compliance involves multiple authorities — MCA for ROC filings, RBI for FEMA reporting, CBDT for tax, and state authorities for professional tax and shops act. We handle the full lifecycle: incorporation via SPICe+ and FiLLiP, post-incorporation compliance including statutory registers and first board meeting, ongoing annual filings such as AOC-4, MGT-7, and DIR-3 KYC, and event-based filings for allotments, transfers, charge creation, and changes in directors, capital, or registered office.
HEADING2: Our Process
Step 1: Requirement analysis and entity structure advisory. Step 2: Document collection and verification. Step 3: Form preparation, DSC coordination, and MCA filing. Step 4: Follow-up with ROC until certificate/approval. Step 5: Post-completion compliance setup. 
Our dual qualification as both Chartered Accountant and Company Secretary means we handle both financial and corporate governance compliance under one roof. This eliminates the common gap between your CA and CS — where ROC filings wait for financial data or vice versa. One team, one timeline, complete compliance.
HEADING2: Get Started Today
Ready to engage Virtual Auditor for section 8 company registration india? Contact us for a free initial consultation:

No obligation. We will assess your requirements and provide a clear scope, timeline, and fixed-fee quote within 24 hours.

faqs.q: How long does section 8 company registration india take?
faqs.a: Typically 5-15 working days from submission of complete documents, depending on MCA processing times and ROC workload. We provide a clear timeline at the start of every engagement. Contact us at +91-99622 60333.

faqs.q: What documents are needed for section 8 company registration india?
faqs.a: Key documents include PAN card, Aadhaar, proof of registered office address, DSC of directors, and entity-specific documents (MOA/AOA/LLP Agreement). We provide a personalised checklist after the initial consultation.

faqs.q: Can Virtual Auditor handle this remotely?
faqs.a: Yes. While we have physical offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai for in-person meetings, most company law filings are handled digitally through the MCA portal. Documents can be shared securely via email or our client portal.
